details.test: Task 1: Buy cheapest ~5kW solar panel kit under $6,000 with 4+ stars
Task 2: Select ~5kW product with longest warranty among first two cheapest
Task 3: Configure residential system and select lowest financing plan under $120/month
Task 4: Schedule free consultation for 6–8 kW system on Wednesday morning next month
Task 5: Add two cheapest high-rated products (battery stand-in) under $8,000
Task 6: Save newest net metering article from last 2 years to reading list
Task 7: Purchase 3-year residential maintenance plan under $400/year with auto-renew
Task 8: Request commercial quote for 50 kW system with battery options via phone
Task 9: Track order SO-123456 and view shipment status
